label: Organization & Formatting
description: All formatting guidelines are followed; YAML is correctly filled out.

label: Organization & Formatting
description: Most formatting guidelines are followed; YAML is correctly filled out.

label: Organization & Formatting
description: Several or all formatting guidelines not followed; YAML contains elements that aren't updated from the template; template file wasn't used.

label: Data Documentation
description: Both data sources (Olympics results and population data) are clearly and accurately described, including where each was downloaded from.

label: Data Documentation
description: Both data sources are described but one description is incomplete or slightly inaccurate.

label: Data Documentation
description: One or both data sources are missing, undocumented, or inaccurately described.

label: Strategy
description: A specific, numbered strategy is written before implementation; it correctly identifies how medals should be counted (not simply counting rows), how the two data sources will be joined, and how mismatched or ambiguous country names will be handled.

label: Strategy
description: A strategy is present and numbered, but is vague in places or misses one of the key judgment calls (medal counting, join approach, or name mismatches).

label: Strategy
description: Strategy is missing, generic/copied from the assignment prompt, or clearly written after the code rather than guiding it.

label: Explore
description: At least 2 clearly stated research questions are addressed, each using a genuinely different chart type (e.g. not two ranking charts); each is supported by an appropriately chosen chart and a written interpretation.

label: Explore
description: Research questions are addressed, but two or more use the same chart type, or a chart/interpretation is weak or missing for one question.

label: Explore
description: Fewer than 2 research questions are addressed, chart types are not meaningfully different, or charts/interpretations are missing.

label: Interrogate
description: Medal counts are verified against the real, official Rio 2016 medal table for multiple countries; the join is checked for silently dropped or unmatched countries; the raw vs. per-capita medal ranking comparison is completed and clearly interpreted, including how and why the story changes.

label: Interrogate
description: Some verification is present (e.g. medal counts or join check) but incomplete, or the raw vs. per-capita comparison is present but the interpretation is thin or doesn't explain why the rankings differ.

label: Interrogate
description: No real verification beyond visual inspection; medal counts are not checked against an external source; the raw vs. per-capita comparison is missing or superficial.

label: Technical & Process
description: All code runs without errors; the submitted .zip contains exactly report.qmd, report.html, transcript.md, and my_clean_data.csv.

label: Technical & Process
description: Code has only one or two errors, otherwise runs; the submitted .zip is missing one of the four required files or includes extra clutter.

label: Technical & Process
description: Code has multiple errors; html file cannot be rendered without significant changes; the submitted .zip is missing report.qmd, report.html, transcript.md, or my_clean_data.csv.
